assertions.text: 包含 ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE ... SUSPEND
assertions.evidence: ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE dwd.orders_clean SUSPEND; ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE dws.order_hourly SUSPEND;

assertions.text: 包含 ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE ... RESUME
assertions.evidence: ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE dwd.orders_clean RESUME; ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE dws.order_hourly RESUME;

assertions.text: 提到 SHOW TABLES WHERE is_dynamic=true 或等效方式列出动态表
